Functions.Name: Map_Add
Functions.Description:
Adds a key and value to the map. If something already uses the provided key it will be overwritten with the new value.
	  After calling Key is guaranteed to be associated with Value until a subsequent mutation of the Map.

Params.Name: TargetMap
Params.Description: The map to add the key and value to

Params.Name: Key
Params.Description: The key that will be used to look the value up

Params.Name: Value
Params.Description: The value to be retrieved later

Return.Description: True if a Value was added, or False if the Key was already present and has been overwritten

Functions.Name: Map_Remove
Functions.Description: Removes a key and its associated value from the map.

Params.Name: TargetMap
Params.Description: The map to remove the key and its associated value from

Params.Name: Key
Params.Description: The key that will be used to look the value up

Return.Description: True if an item was removed (False indicates nothing in the map uses the provided key)

Functions.Name: Map_Find
Functions.Description: Finds the value associated with the provided Key

Params.Name: TargetMap
Params.Description: The map to perform the lookup on

Params.Name: Key
Params.Description: The key that will be used to look the value up

Params.Name: Value
Params.Description: The value associated with the key, default constructed if key was not found

Return.Description: True if an item was found (False indicates nothing in the map uses the provided key)

Functions.Name: Map_Contains
Functions.Description: Checks whether key is in a provided Map

Params.Name: TargetMap
Params.Description: The map to perform the lookup on

Params.Name: Key
Params.Description: The key that will be used to lookup

Return.Description: True if an item was found (False indicates nothing in the map uses the provided key)

Functions.Name: Map_Keys
Functions.Description: Outputs an array of all keys present in the map

Params.Name: TargetMap
Params.Description: The map to get the list of keys from

Params.Name: Keys
Params.Description: All keys present in the map

Functions.Name: Map_Values
Functions.Description: Outputs an array of all values present in the map

Params.Name: TargetMap
Params.Description: The map to get the list of values from

Params.Name: Values
Params.Description: All values present in the map

Functions.Name: Map_Length
Functions.Description: Determines the number of entries in a provided Map

Return.Description: The number of entries in the map

Functions.Name: Map_Clear
Functions.Description: Clears a map of all entries, resetting it to empty

Functions.Name: SetMapPropertyByName
Functions.Description: Not exposed to users. Supports setting a map property on an object by name.
